additionalDescription: Contains both the raw dataset and the segmented dataset (5 s segments, 31428 resulting audio files + annotations for each segment) used for training together with splits. Some empty files are kept for audio augmentation.
captureDevice: SongMeter 4 recorders (Wildlife Acoustics Inc, Concord, MA, USA)
description: Bioacoustic dataset of Boreal Owl (Aegolius funereus) vocalizations designed for evaluating deep learning acoustic classifiers under varying signal-to-noise ratio conditions. The dataset was used to benchmark custom CNN models and BirdNET for nocturnal bird detection tasks.
name: Boreal Owl
title: Michaud_CNN_SNR_Boreal_owl_vocalizations
